_comment: Each entry maps a slug to an HTML file in this repo. The sync sidecar reads this manifest and UPSERTs into the email_templates table (rows where source='git'). Marketing edits HTML; the manifest stays small.

templates.name: Free → Paid upgrade nudge
templates.subject: Remix IDE — Ready for more?
templates.description: Sent to free users who are hitting limits, nudging them to upgrade.

templates.name: Discount code
templates.subject: Remix IDE — A discount for you
templates.description: Sent when a discount/promo code is issued to a user.

templates.name: Welcome — Starter plan
templates.subject: Remix IDE — Welcome to Starter
templates.description: Sent when a user activates the Starter subscription.

templates.name: Welcome — Pro plan
templates.subject: Remix IDE — You just went Pro
templates.description: Sent when a user activates the Pro subscription.

templates.name: Credits running low
templates.subject: Remix IDE — Credits running low
templates.description: Sent when a user's AI credit balance falls below threshold.

templates.name: Renewal reminder
templates.subject: Remix IDE — Subscription renews soon
templates.description: Sent N days before a subscription auto-renews.

templates.name: Subscription canceled
templates.subject: Remix IDE — Subscription canceled
templates.description: Confirmation email when a user cancels.

templates.name: Subscription expired
templates.subject: Remix IDE — Subscription ended
templates.description: Sent when a subscription term ends without renewal.

templates.name: Feature spotlight
templates.subject: Remix IDE — Have you tried the security agent?

templates.name: Free-tier milestone recap
templates.subject: Remix IDE — Not bad.
templates.description: Encouragement email at usage milestones for free users.

templates.name: Beta — winding down
templates.subject: Remix IDE Beta — Your access is winding down
templates.description: Heads-up notice to beta users before beta ends.

templates.name: Beta ended + farewell discount
templates.subject: Remix IDE Beta — That's a wrap. Here's your discount.
templates.description: Sent when beta access ends, includes a launch-discount code.

templates.name: Welcome — generic signup
templates.subject: Welcome to Remix IDE
templates.description: Default welcome email on account creation.
